{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Drive rupture
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|A [[Drive rupture]] is a possible crisis scenario.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c33">''The Engineer'', chapter 33</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon events]]
